item.title: Server Rules
item.description:
Respect & Communication

  • Treat every player with respect — no harassment, hate speech, or discrimination.
  • Keep chat civil. Disagreements happen; toxicity doesn’t have to.
  • No spamming or excessive use of caps.

No Cheating or Exploits

  • No x-ray, fly hacks, kill aura, or any form of cheating.
  • No exploiting bugs or glitches for unfair advantage. Report them instead.
  • Allowed mods: performance mods (Optifine, Sodium, Lithium), minimaps without cave/entity radar, cosmetic shaders.
  • Not allowed: x-ray texture packs, auto-clickers, macros that play for you, hacked clients.

Staff Compliance

  • Follow staff instructions. They’re here to keep the server fair and fun.
  • Don’t impersonate staff or lie about staff endorsement.
  • Appeals are welcome — argue your case respectfully.

Common Sense

  • If it feels wrong, it probably is. Use good judgment.
  • These rules can’t cover everything — staff reserve the right to act on behavior that harms the community, even if it’s not explicitly listed.

Breaking rules may result in warnings, temporary bans, or permanent bans depending on severity. Repeated offenses escalate.

item.title: How to Join
item.description:
Java Edition

  1. Open Minecraft Java Edition (version 1.21.11)
  2. Click Multiplayer from the main menu
  3. Click Add Server
  4. Enter the server address: mc.hardknocks.university
  5. Click Done, then double-click the server to connect

Bedrock Edition

  1. Open Minecraft Bedrock Edition (Windows, mobile, or console)
  2. Go to the Servers tab
  3. Scroll down and click Add Server
  4. Server Address: mc.hardknocks.university
  5. Port: 19132
  6. Click Save, then tap the server to join

Note: The server runs version 1.21.11 (Mounts of Mayhem). Make sure your game is on the correct version before connecting. Bedrock crossplay is handled automatically — no extra setup needed.

item.title: Server Features
item.description:
Performance

The server runs on optimized software to keep gameplay smooth. No lag, no excuses. Chunk loading, entity ticking, and redstone all run at full speed without cutting corners.

Security

Anti-cheat protection keeps the playing field level. Account security measures prevent unauthorized access. You play fair, we make sure everyone else does too.

Land Protection

Claim your territory and control who can build, break, or interact within it. Your builds are safe whether you’re online or off. No more logging in to find your house flattened.

item.title: FAQ
item.description:
How do I join the server?
Add mc.hardknocks.university to your server list. Java Edition connects directly; Bedrock Edition uses port 19132. Check the full How to Join guide for step-by-step instructions.
What version is the server running?
The server runs Minecraft 1.21.11 (Mounts of Mayhem) with Java and Bedrock crossplay enabled.
Can I use Optifine or Sodium?
Yes. Performance mods like Optifine, Sodium, Lithium, and cosmetic shader packs are all allowed. Minimaps are fine as long as they don't show caves or entities. X-ray texture packs and hacked clients are not allowed.
How do land claims work?
You can claim areas of land to protect your builds from griefing. Claimed land prevents other players from building, breaking, or interacting within your territory unless you grant them access.
What happens when I die?
A grave spawns at your death location keeping your items safe. You won't get a compass, directional arrow, or coordinates — you'll need to remember where you were and find your way back. Your items are protected; the journey back is part of the game.
Will the world ever reset?
No. The world is permanent. Your builds are here to stay. Major Minecraft updates that add new terrain generation will be handled by expanding the world border, not resetting.
Is there a Discord server?
Coming soon. Stay tuned.
How do I apply for staff?
Staff applications will open when the community grows. For now, be active, be helpful, and be a good member of the community — that's the best application.
Are there custom items or economy plugins?
No. The server is as close to vanilla as possible. No custom items, no server currency, no teleportation commands. Plugins are only used for protection, security, and quality of life.

item.title: Vote for Us
item.description:
Voting helps Hard Knocks University climb the server rankings so new players can find us. It takes less than a minute and makes a real difference.

Where to Vote

Minecraft-MP

Vote on Minecraft-MP

PlanetMinecraft

Vote on PlanetMinecraft

TopG

Vote on TopG

MC Server List

Vote on MC Server List

Why Vote?

  • Visibility — Higher rankings mean more players discover the server
  • Community growth — A bigger community means more builds, more collaboration, more fun
  • It’s free — Takes 30 seconds, costs nothing

Rewards

Vote rewards are being finalized. They’ll be cosmetic or quality-of-life only — nothing that gives a gameplay advantage. This is a vanilla server, after all.

item.title: Staff
item.description:
Owner

Beryndil

Server founder, developer, and lead administrator. Builds the tools, sets the rules, keeps the lights on.

Roles

  • Owner — Full server administration, plugin configuration, final say on policy
  • Admin — Day-to-day management, rule enforcement, player support
  • Moderator — Chat moderation, handling reports, welcoming new players

Interested in joining the team? Staff applications will open as the community grows. Be active, be helpful, and be a good community member — that’s the best resume.

item.title: Connect
item.description:
Alpha Software — Spyglass Connect is in active development. Expect bugs, missing features, and rough edges.

Overview

Spyglass Connect is a desktop companion app that reads your Minecraft Java Edition save files and streams the data to your phone over local WiFi. No cloud servers, no accounts — everything stays on your network.

Get Spyglass Connect for Desktop

How It Works

  1. Launch Spyglass Connect on your PC (Windows, macOS, or Linux)
  2. Scan the QR code shown on your PC from the Spyglass app on your phone
  3. Done — your phone auto-reconnects whenever both devices are on the same WiFi

Under the hood: QR code pairs devices via ECDH key exchange, then communicates over an encrypted WebSocket (AES-256-GCM). mDNS handles automatic reconnection. Protocol version negotiation ensures both apps are compatible — if either side is outdated, you’ll see a clear error message.

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description:
Alpha Software — Spyglass and Spyglass Connect are in active development. Expect bugs, missing features, and rough edges.

Not Affiliated with Mojang

Spyglass is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Mojang Studios or Microsoft. Minecraft is a trademark of Mojang Studios. All game data, names, and images are used for informational and reference purposes only.

Trademarks

“Minecraft” is a trademark of Mojang Studios, a subsidiary of Microsoft Corporation. All other trademarks, trade names, and logos mentioned in this application are the property of their respective owners.

item.title: Features
item.description:
Alpha Software — Spyglass Connect is in active development. Expect bugs, missing features, and rough edges.

Spyglass Connect

Pair your phone with the Spyglass Connect desktop companion to access your Minecraft world data over local WiFi. No cloud servers, no accounts — everything stays on your network.

Feature Description
QR Pairing Scan a QR code to connect — auto-reconnects whenever you’re on the same WiFi
Character Viewer See your full equipment — armor, weapons, tools, and enchantments
Inventory Viewer Browse your complete inventory, armor, offhand, and ender chest
Chest Finder Search for any item across all containers — chests, barrels, shulker boxes, hoppers
Structure Locator Find villages, temples, monuments, strongholds, and more with coordinates and distance
Overhead Map Interactive terrain map with structure markers and player position

Fully encrypted (ECDH + AES-256-GCM). Auto-reconnects via mDNS. Protocol v2 with version negotiation — incompatible versions show a clear update message.

item.title: License
item.description:
Copyright (c) 2026 Beryndil. All rights reserved.

1. Permitted Use

You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the Spyglass application as distributed through official release channels for personal, non-commercial purposes.

2. Restrictions

You may NOT, without the prior written consent of the copyright holder:

  • Copy, reproduce, or duplicate the source code or application
  • Modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works based on the source code or application
  • Distribute, sublicense, lease, rent, loan, or otherwise transfer the source code or application to any third party
  • Reverse-engineer, decompile, disassemble, or otherwise attempt to derive the source code from the compiled application
  • Use the source code or application for any commercial purpose
  • Remove, alter, or obscure any proprietary notices, labels, or marks

3. Third-Party Assets

This application includes third-party assets that are subject to their own licenses:

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Spyglass Connect is a free, ad-supported Android app created by Beryndil. This policy explains what data the app collects, how it is used, and the choices you have.

1. Information We Collect

Spyglass itself does not collect any personal information such as names, email addresses, or account credentials. The app does not require you to create an account.

The following third-party services may collect data when enabled:

2. Google AdMob

Spyglass displays banner ads via Google AdMob. AdMob and its mediation partners may collect:
